perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two women in a Costco store, standing in front of a refrigerated display case containing 'Strawberry Pork Floss Submarine Sandwiches'. One woman wears a blue off-the-shoulder top and a black Kangol beret, while the other is in a black and white top. They express shock and curiosity through wide eyes and hand gestures. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living room setting where they hold a single sandwich. One woman cuts it in half on a wooden cutting board, revealing the layers of strawberry, pork floss, and cream. (3) They both eat the sandwich, reacting with exaggerated expressions of delight, nodding, and giving thumbs up. Close-up shots highlight the texture of the bread and the freshness of the strawberries.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, excited tone, introducing the Costco product as part of a 'heresy' series. Faint supermarket ambient hum is heard in the background. (2) The vocal tone remains energetic as the speakers describe the ingredients (strawberries, pork floss, mascarpone). Frequent use of 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects coincides with text appearing on screen. (3) The music maintains a fast tempo as the women conclude their review with enthusiastic recommendations, their voices overlapping in excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the dialogue throughout. (2) Hook Text: '我是勇者' (I am a brave person) appears in purple/yellow as a title. (3) Hook Text: '邪教系列 草莓肉鬆潛艇堡' (Heresy Series: Strawberry Pork Floss Submarine Sandwich) labels the product. (4) Decorative Text: '不好吃' (Not tasty) with an 'X' mark appears briefly for dramatic effect. (5) Hook Text: '一定要試試看' (Must try it) appears at the end in large yellow font to encourage viewers.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 female passer-by, 1 male passer-by in store background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a blue off-the-shoulder denim-style top with a black Kangol beret; the other wears a white puff-sleeve top with a black vest overlay.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and refrigerated displays. Second scene is a home interior with a brown leather sofa and yellow plush toys on the shelf.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright supermarket fluorescent lighting followed by warm domestic indoor lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a fast-paced, entertaining review of a novel and somewhat controversial food product (strawberry and pork floss sandwich) from Costco. It uses high-energy visuals and audio to engage viewers and concludes with a strong positive recommendation for a 'bizarre' flavor combination.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed review and recommendation of a specific Costco Kirkland Signature product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of the term '邪教系列' (Heresy Series) to categorize strange food combinations.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast editing and beat-synced text overlays are characteristic of modern short-form social media vlogs intended to maintain high retention.
